ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the product per unit */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last reordered */,
  "last_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variation belongs to */,
  "variation_name" TEXT /* Name of the variation (e.g., color, size) */,
  "variation_value" TEXT /* Value of the variation (e.g., black, blue, red) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the variation */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the variation */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the variation */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the variation was last reordered */,
  "last_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the last reorder for the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variation the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variation in stock */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the variation was last reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the last reorder */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last checked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variation the item is */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variation ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the variation at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact person's email */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact person's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
